title: Workflow
description: A template's workflow state machine. Same wire shape as the Questionnaire schema. The state name's kind prefix (the substring before the first '__') dispatches at access time to a typed WorkflowStep — BEGIN/END → system, staff_review → staff, notarization → respondent, mailroom_send → staff, mailroom_receive → staff.

StateName.description: A workflow state name. The kind prefix (everything before the first '__') must map to a registered WorkflowStep type: 'BEGIN'/'END' (system), 'staff_review' (staff), 'notarization' (respondent), 'mailroom_send' (staff), 'mailroom_receive' (staff).
